name: Surtr, Sarkaz of Laevateinn
desc:
1+ FIRE monsters
You can only Link Summon 1 "Surtr, Sarkaz of Laevateinn" per turn.
This card cannot be destroyed, or banished by your opponent's card effects during the turn this card is Link Summoned.
(Quick effect): You can banish any number of FIRE monsters in your GY, this card gain ATK equal to that number * 300, also this card can attack up to the number of monster card your opponent controls +1 during the Battle Phase of this turn.
During the Standby Phase: Destroy this card.
strings: Banish FIRE monsters to gain ATK & extra attacks
